output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-075","author":"SarahJ_84","text":"Does anyone know if 'Hopeful Hearts Charity' is legitimate? I saw a post on WhatsApp asking for donations to help rebuild homes after the floods, but they didn't have a website link and asked me to send money directly to a personal bank account. It feels a bit suspicious as most charities use their official portals. #CharityCheck","category":"Fraud","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This post describes a potential impersonation of a charity that requires specialist investigation to verify authenticity.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"FraudScam","acceptableEscalationReasons":["FraudScam"],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":true,"isStoryPost":false}]}
